title: Soulection Radio Show #378 w/ Bas
content:
Dreamville Records artist Bas guests and performs live.


<!--more-->

Find Bas on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/bas/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Bas) also check out [Dreamville](https://twitter.com/Dreamville)

Checkout Bas's [Interview on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p7rgHy-ZwVg), Live Performance on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Htpx6WhDWBo), or [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/p/BoU57MNAhok/?taken-by=soulection)
